label_verbatim: The municipal officers of ___ have, by majority vote, authorized the formation of a Local Development Corporation
rationale: Name of the municipality whose officers voted to authorize the LDC. Distinct from entity.* (which is the LDC being formed) — the municipality is the authorizing governmental body, not the entity formed.

label_verbatim: The name of the corporation is intended to be ___
rationale: Proposed name of the Local Development Corporation being formed; must match the entity.name on the accompanying NP_MNPCA-6.

First municipal officer's printed name and capacity (e.g., 'Jane Doe, Town Council Chair'). Indexed roster pattern with 5 inline rows (1–5); per-row signature blank to the right is wet-ink only with no AcroForm widget. Distinct from officer_N.* (corporate roster) — these are governmental officers, not corporate.

label_verbatim: [ ] Names, capacities and signatures of additional municipal officers attached hereto as Exhibit ___, and made a part hereof
rationale: Boolean opt-in indicating an exhibit listing additional municipal officers is attached (used when the municipality has more than 5 voting officers). Naming follows the entity.additional_*_present convention from MBCA-6.
Letter of the exhibit containing additional officer signatures. Naming follows entity.additional_incorporators_exhibit_letter convention from MBCA-6.

label_verbatim: Attest: ___ (Signature of Municipal Clerk) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Printed name and capacity of the Municipal Clerk attesting to the vote (Shape-D widget label). Distinct from filing.signer.* — the Clerk is the form's attester, not the filer of the underlying LDC; municipal_clerk.* parallels the municipal_officer_N.* family.
Date the Municipal Clerk attested to the form. Re-uses filing.date_signed (the standard body-form signing date), consistent with formation-form conventions.
